title: PageChunkAnchorLookupOutput
description: Output schema for Use Case 1: Page/Chunk Anchor Lookup. Returns index records whose page_anchor falls within the query's page_range, ordered by page_anchor ascending.

source_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the source document content. Only included if include_source_hashes=true in input query.

page_anchor.description: Page number within the document. Used for sorting results.

chunk_id.description: Chunk identifier from the P90 chunk manifest (e.g., structure or content_metadata chunk).

model_lane.description: The worker model lane that produced this record (e.g., qwen3.6:35b-a3b-bf16). Only included if include_model_lane=true in input query.

audit_status.description: Current audit status from P94 promoted index.

fact_content.description: The extracted fact/content fields from the source document. Structure depends on chunk type (structure vs content_metadata).
